title: Credit Score Recovery Plan
description: Structured plan to rebuild credit score over 12 months through utilization reduction, dispute resolution, and new credit history.
goal: Raise credit score from 620 to 750 by end of 2026

milestones.label: Dispute incorrect late payment entries with bureaus
Open secured credit card to build new positive history

notes: Focus on utilization first — it's the fastest lever. Dispute window opens March 2026. Secured card application planned for Q2.
